title: Explore the Contact Details Element
excerpt: Create a single email input for both email collection and Link authentication. If you already have customer email addresses, [pass them directly to the Payment Element](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/link/payment-element-link.md?elements=pass-email) instead. Create a single email input for both email collection and Link authentication by adding the [Contact Details Element](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/elements/contact-details-element.md) (previously known as the Link Authentication Element) to your Elements integration. If your customer doesn’t have a Link account, and they select one of its supported payment methods (credit card, debit card, or US bank), they’re given the option of signing up.…
